return(function(...)local P,C do local a,i,U,d,p=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function q(P,C)local i=0 for U=0,7,1 do local d=P/2+C/2 if d~=a(d)then i=i+2^U end P=a(P/2)C=a(C/2)end return i end local m,h="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\195\254\158\253)\215\191\179\248\205*\198\174\253\228\171\172\226\208\213\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local R=65 local K=1417 local N=false local function E(P)local E={}for C=1,#P,2 do local a=p(P,C,C+1)E[#E+1]=d(a,16)end local n={}for P=0,3,1 do local C=E[P+1]local a=((C-K)+256)%256 local i=U(m,P%16+1)local d=U(h,P%R+1)n[P+1]=q(q(a,i),d)end local Z=((n[1]+n[2]*256)+n[3]*65536)+n[4]*16777216 local Q={}for P=1,Z,1 do local C=E[P+4]if N and P%2==0 then C=(C%16)*16+a(C/16)end local d=((C-K)+256)%256 local p=(P-1)%16+1 local n=(P-1)%R+1 local Z=U(m,p)local g=U(h,n)Q[P]=i(q(q(d,Z),g))end return table.concat(Q)end local
